description: Style noteFounded by Maurice Rance in 1971, Recherche Nature Cosmetique (rnc) brings you Eau De Plaisir fragrance, which has over 60% natural ingredients in its formulas. The glass flask references the ornaments of the gates of the Louvre, Paris, and is crafted by a renowned glassmaker in Milan the shape of the bottle (designed by Rance) has been retained since the day of its inception. Product DetailsThe Vetiver from Eau De Plaisir is an Eaux De Cologne - the result of mixing high end essential oils with techniques handed down from centuries. The Vetiver has a fragrance with overtones of classic vetiver embellished with notes of citrus rind and oriental wood, soften with Italian flowers. The top notes are petitgrain, lime and bergamot that blend into heart notes of cardamom, sage and artemisia. The dry down has base notes of ambergris, vetiver and pepper.CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize125 ml
